title: Empty SQL result (no rows, no columns)
description: Execution of a valid SQL SELECT-query produces a completely empty result - there are no even columns.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test1 (id Int32, name String, created_at DateTime);
CREATE TABLE test2 (value Nullable(Int32), description String, active Nullable(Boolean) DEFAULT 1);
INSERT INTO test2 VALUES (NULL, 'Test entry', NULL);
SELECT (SELECT 1) AS dummy_col FROM test1 WHERE id = 2 LIMIT 1;
key_bug_features: Valid SQL SELECT-query returns empty result with no columns
